overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a medieval-themed video game. The player character explores a stone and timber farmstead building at night, illuminated by moonlight and a burning outdoor fireplace, wielding a wooden club.

events.description: player character raises wooden club into view

uneven dirt path with scattered debris
dark night sky with faint clouds and starlight

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a stone cottage at night across an open dirt yard. The night sky is visible overhead with scattered clouds. At the end of the segment, the player raises a wooden club into the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered porch area with outdoor fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the stone wall holding a wooden club, approaching the glowing fireplace

heavy timber framing supporting the roof overhang
wooden barrels stored under the covered area

segments.scene_description: Moving under the building's overhang, the player approaches a burning outdoor fireplace. The lighting shifts from cool moonlight to warm firelight. Wooden barrels and support beams become visible as the player moves into the covered porch area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered workshop porch with storage containers

events.description: player swings wooden club at object on the ground

agents.ego_description: examining the porch area with barrels and tools, then swinging the club at something on the ground

scattered wooden planks and debris on the ground

segments.scene_description: The player explores the covered porch area containing wooden barrels, woven baskets, and scattered planks. The fireplace glows in the background. The player swings the wooden club at an object on the ground before continuing to look around the workspace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a moonlit open yard into the warm, cluttered shelter of a stone cottage porch. It begins with a walk across a dirt yard under a cloudy night sky, ending this approach as a wooden club is raised into the frame. As the camera moves under the building's overhang, the cool moonlight shifts into the orange glow of a burning outdoor fireplace, revealing heavy support beams and wooden barrels. The scene then expands into the covered workspace, passing by woven baskets and scattered planks before the club swings down at an object on the ground. Finally, the camera continues to survey the dimly lit porch area with the fireplace glowing steadily in the background.
